# Koala Statements

> Free AI-native financial modeling tool that turns a one-sentence business description into a complete, investor-ready 3-statement financial model — income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow — with AI-driven assumptions, multi-scenario forecasts, and industry benchmarks.

Koala Statements is free for everyone: build, edit, and save financial models with no paid tiers and no project caps. The pages listed below are the public, crawlable parts of the site. The in-app model builder, user dashboard, and shared report links require an account or a direct invite and are excluded from indexing (see /robots.txt).

## Pages

- [Home](https://koalastatements.com/): Product overview, how it works, and key features of the AI financial modeling tool.
- [Learn](https://koalastatements.com/learn): Free guides explaining how financial statements work — income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, margins, runway, and common mistakes.
- [Privacy Policy](https://koalastatements.com/privacy): How Koala Statements collects, uses, stores, and protects user data.
- [Terms of Service](https://koalastatements.com/terms): The terms that govern use of Koala Statements.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://koalastatements.com/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable URLs.
